title: Cleaning Manager
description:
Job Description: Cleaning Manager
Location: Singapore
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: General Manager

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced and proactive Cleaning Manager to oversee our cleaning operations across multiple sites in Singapore. You will manage site supervisors, ensure high standards of hygiene, maintain client satisfaction, and ensure strict compliance with Singapore’s regulatory frameworks (NEA, MOM, WSH).

The ideal candidate is a problem-solver who understands Performance-Based Contracting and can effectively manage a diverse workforce.

Key Responsibilities

1. Operations Management

• Oversee daily cleaning operations across residential project sites.

• Plan and optimize deployment schedules (manpower planning) to ensure sufficient coverage.

• Conduct regular site inspections and audits to ensure service delivery meets Quality Assurance (QA) standards.

• Transition new projects, including site setup, equipment deployment, and SOP implementation.

2. Client Relationship Management

• Serve as the main point of contact for property managers and building owners.

• Attend monthly/quarterly management meetings to report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs).

• Handle feedback and complaints professionally, implementing immediate corrective actions.

3. Manpower & Training

• Lead and mentor a team of Site Supervisors, Team Leaders, and Cleaning Attendants.

• Ensure the company complies with the Progressive Wage Model (PWM) regarding cleaner job scopes and wage ladders.

• Identify training needs and coordinate WSQ (Workforce Skills Qualifications) training for staff.

• Monitor staff attendance, overtime, and discipline.

4. Compliance & Safety

• Ensure all sites comply with Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) regulations to prevent accidents.

• Maintain the company’s NEA Cleaning Business License requirements.

• Manage proper documentation for Risk Assessments (RA) and Safe Work Procedures (SWP).

5. Inventory & Budgeting

• Manage inventory of cleaning chemicals, consumables, and machinery.

• Oversee equipment maintenance schedules (scrubbers, polishers, high-pressure jets).

• Assist in budget planning and cost control to maximize project profitability.

Requirements

Education & Experience

• Minimum Diploma in Facilities Management, Business, or a related field.

• 1 to 3 years of managerial experience in the Cleaning or Facilities Management industry in Singapore.

• Proven experience managing teams across multiple locations.

Technical Skills

• Familiarity with outcome-based cleaning contracts and digital inspection tools.

• Knowledge of specialized cleaning (carpet shampooing, marble polishing, high-rise glass cleaning) is an advantage.

Certifications (Preferred)

• WSQ Certificates in Environmental Cleaning.

• Safe Management Officer (SMO) or BizSafe Level 2 certification.

Soft Skills & Others

• Strong leadership with the ability to motivate a diverse, multi-generational workforce.

• Bilingual proficiency (English and Mandarin) is a strong plus to communicate effectively with ground staff.

What We Offer

• Competitive Salary: SGD 2,800 - SGD 3,500 based on experience

• Transport Allowance

• Performance Bonus

• Medical Benefits.

• Opportunities for professional development.

districts.location: D21 Upper Bukit Timah, Clementi Park, Ulu Pandan
